news.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

news.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role

news.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

news.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

news.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

news.title: Scientists use AI to decode sperm whale communication, discovering a possible phonetic alphabet and revealing that Mediterranean sperm whales have different dialects by region
news.description: [TIMES OF INDIA] Science News: Scientists using artificial intelligence (AI) have uncovered a complex communication system among sperm whales, identifying a kind of phonetic alphabe.

news.title: Meta aims to make its own chips as AI giants strive for independence from strained supply chain
news.description: [NEW YORK POST] Mark Zuckerberg's Meta plans to design its own artificial intelligence chips in-house starting in September – part of an industry-wide effort by the biggest names in AI to start making their own chips amid ongoing high demand.

news.title: Microsoft emissions surged 25% during data center boom
news.description: [SANTA ANA ORANGE COUNTY REGISTER] It's the latest technology company to report a setback in its efforts to erase emissions amid heavy spending on artificial intelligence data centers.
